title: Creating a Chatbot for a Mental Health Support Service
scenario: Create a conversational agent that can provide mental health support and resources to users. The agent should be empathetic, non-judgmental, and able to provide guidance on how to access local mental health services. Ensure the agent's responses are concise and within a 50-word limit.

evaluationCriteria.description: Is the conversational agent empathetic and understanding?
Does the conversational agent provide guidance on how to access local mental health services?
Does the prompt adhere to the constraint of being under 50 words?
